think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify all temporal segments where Jace Fry is performing an action in the video.

1.  **Identify Jace Fry:** He is the pitcher for the Chicago White Sox, wearing jersey number 57.
2.  **Scan the video for his appearances:**
    *   00:06 - 00:10: Close-up of Fry standing on the mound.
    *   00:10 - 00:14: Fry pitching to the batter.
    *   00:29 - 00:32: Fry standing on the mound, preparing to pitch.
    *   00:32 - 00:35: Fry pitching again.
    *   00:40 - 00:44: Close-up of Fry rubbing the ball.
    *   00:51 - 00:53: Close-up of Fry looking towards the batter.
    *   00:53 - 00:56: Fry pitching.
    *   00:58 - 01:06: Fry reacting to the walk, adjusting his cap, and walking around the mound.
    *   01:29 - 01:31: Close-up of Fry looking towards the batter.
    *   01:33 - 01:40: Fry pitching to Schwarber.
    *   01:58 - 02:02: Fry pitching to Schwarber.
    *   02:03 - 02:05: Close-up of Fry rubbing the ball.
    *   02:18 - 02:21: Fry pitching to Schwarber.
    *   02:30 - 02:35: Close-up of Fry standing on the mound.
    *   02:35 - 02:41: Fry pitching to Schwarber.
    *   02:45 - 02:53: Close-up of Fry rubbing the ball and looking around.
    *   02:54 - 02:57: Fry pitching (close-up angle).
    *   03:02 - 03:07: Fry pitching to Schwarber.
    *   03:21 - 03:22: Fry standing on the mound.
    *   03:25 - 03:30: Fry walking off the mound after the play.

3.  **Define segments and actions:**
    *   00:06 - 00:10: Standing on mound, face visible.
    *   00:10 - 00:14: Pitching, face visible.
    *   00:29 - 00:32: Standing/preparing, face visible.
    *   00:32 - 00:35: Pitching, face visible.
    *   00:40 - 00:44: Rubbing ball, face visible.
    *   00:51 - 00:53: Standing, face visible.
    *   00:53 - 00:56: Pitching, face visible.
    *   00:58 - 01:06: Reacting/walking, face visible.
    *   01:29 - 01:31: Standing, face visible.
    *   01:33 - 01:40: Pitching, face visible.
    *   01:58 - 02:02: Pitching, face visible.
    *   02:03 - 02:05: Rubbing ball, face visible.
    *   02:18 - 02:21: Pitching, face visible.
    *   02:30 - 02:35: Standing, face visible.
    *   02:35 - 02:41: Pitching, face visible.
    *   02:45 - 02:53: Rubbing ball/standing, face visible.
    *   02:54 - 02:57: Pitching, face visible.
    *   03:02 - 03:07: Pitching, face visible.
    *   03:21 - 03:22: Standing, face visible.
    *   03:25 - 03:30: Walking off mound, face visible (back/side).
